home.title: Select import type
home.description: Your choice determines the next steps — file format, field mapping, and duplicate rules.
home.active_session: Import in progress. Wait for it to finish or stop it.
home.crm_description: Leads, contacts, companies, deals and linked import.
home.task_description: Tasks, subtasks, comments, checklists and attachments.
home.footer: Import type can be changed later — progress is saved.
home.active_session_wait: Wait for it to finish or
home.active_session_tail: to cancel it. A new import will be available after completion or cancellation.

history.title: Import history
history.empty_description: All runs will appear here after the first import.
history.unavailable_description: Try refreshing the page or come back later.

access.title: Access rights
access.message: No role assigned for import operations.
access.description: Contact your portal administrator to get an operator role or read access to history and reports.

crm.flavor_direct_subtitle: Into standard CRM sections — deals, contacts, companies.
crm.flavor_linked_subtitle: One row creates multiple linked entities.
crm.flavor_bulk_subtitle: Attach files to fields of existing CRM records.
crm.linked_secondary_no_options: No linked options for this entity
crm.fields_editable_note: Fields can be changed at the “Mapping” step
crm.bulk_no_entity_field: First select a CRM entity and a file field
crm.hint_direct: You can apply a field mapping template.
crm.hint_linked: We'll link rows by the selected field — no duplicates.

bulk.file_field_no_options: The selected entity has no File-type fields
bulk.preview_subtitle: The file will be attached to each found record
bulk.upload_preparing: Preparing file and creating upload session.
bulk.upload_running: File is already uploading, status updates automatically.
bulk.hint: One file will be attached to each row.
bulk.wizard_subtitle: Attach a file to selected CRM entities by filter — no Excel file needed.
bulk.wizard_step1_title: Step 1 — Select entity type and filter
bulk.wizard_filter_none: No filter set. All {entity} will be included in bulk attachment.
bulk.wizard_filter_hint: If no fields are added, all {entity} will be selected.
bulk.wizard_filter_hint_loaded: Showing system and custom fields. Search works by Bitrix24 field name.
bulk.wizard_filter_no_filter: No filters — all {entity} will be selected
bulk.wizard_preview_desc: Select the records you need by Bitrix24 fields, check the preview, then specify the file and target field.
bulk.wizard_preview_empty: No records found for the set filter. Go back and change the filter.
bulk.wizard_preview_total_desc: records will be included in bulk file attachment
bulk.wizard_file_hint: File will be attached to each of the {total} records
bulk.wizard_field_hint: Showing system and custom File-type fields from Bitrix24
bulk.wizard_field_no_file_fields: No File-type fields found — enter ID manually
bulk.wizard_memo_text1: Upload a file from your computer — it will be attached to each filtered record.
bulk.wizard_memo_text2: For the target field, use a Bitrix24 custom field ID of type File, e.g. `UF_CRM_*`.
bulk.wizard_resume_from: Processed {processed} of {total} records. Operation will resume from record {next}.
bulk.wizard_resume_new: Operation has not started. You can restart.

task.section_subtitle: Select what to import into tasks.
task.bulk_subtitle: Find tasks by filter and attach the same file to each.
task.bulk_filter_note: If no filter is set, all available tasks will be selected.
task.bulk_preview_subtitle: One file will be attached to all found tasks
task.bulk_preview_help: Check the selection before starting attachment.
task.bulk_preview_empty: Preview is empty. Check the filter or run attachment for the full selection.
task.bulk_upload_preparing: Preparing file and creating upload session.
task.bulk_upload_running: File is already being attached, status updates automatically.
task.mode_excel_subtitle: Set up a task filter, upload one file, and run attachment to all found tasks.

hr.departments_subtitle: To link to a department, enter the numeric ID in the "Department (ID)" column.
hr.departments_subtitle2: View the list of your portal's departments with their IDs.

file.formats: Supports Excel and CSV formats, file size up to {size}
file.bulk_formats: Upload any file format, file size up to {size}
file.error_unsupported: Unsupported file format. Please upload a .xlsx, .xls, or .csv file.
file.error_size: File is too large: {size} MB. Maximum for import is {max}.
file.error_xls: The file has .xls extension but its content does not match Excel format. Open it in Excel and save as .xlsx or .csv.
file.error_xlsx: The file has .xlsx extension but its content is corrupted. Try saving the file in Excel again.

dropzone.locked_bulk: First select a CRM entity and file field
dropzone.locked_running_help: Upload is already in progress. To replace the file, first stop the current session.
dropzone.locked_help_bulk: The right block will become active after selecting the destination field.
dropzone.locked_help_task: The right block will become active after verifying the task selection.

step.s1_description: Select the import method and upload your file.
step.s2_description: Check header rows, data start, and sheet structure.
step.s3_description: View the first rows of the file before mapping fields.
step.s4_description: Match file columns to Bitrix24 fields.
step.s5_description: Set up duplicate search and handling rules.
step.s6_description: Review test run results before the main import.
step.s7_description: Check final statistics and complete the scenario.

preview.title: File preview
preview.empty: After uploading a file, the first rows will appear here.
preview.row_limit_message: Preview shows only the first rows. Total data: {total}.

mapping.title: Field mapping
mapping.pending: Save the mapping and selected default values to proceed to the next step.
mapping.required_info: These fields are needed first during validation and import.
mapping.required_no_info: You can proceed without the required minimum.
mapping.empty: After uploading a file, the column list for mapping will appear here.

task_defaults.responsible_subtitle: If the file has no RESPONSIBLE_ID column or the value is empty, the selected user will be used.
task_defaults.responsible_hint_set: The default assignee is selected and can replace an empty value in a row.
task_defaults.responsible_hint_unset: If you don't want to map RESPONSIBLE_ID from the file, select an assignee here.
task_defaults.creator_subtitle: If the file has no CREATED_BY column or the value is empty, the selected creator will be used.
task_defaults.creator_hint_set: The default creator is selected and can replace an empty value in a row.
task_defaults.creator_hint_unset: If you don't want to map CREATED_BY from the file, select a creator here.
task_defaults.author_subtitle: If the file has no AUTHOR_ID column or the value is empty, the comment will be sent from the selected user.
task_defaults.author_hint_set: The default user is selected and will be used if AUTHOR_ID is empty.
task_defaults.author_hint_unset: If you don't want to map AUTHOR_ID from the file, select a user here.

alias_rules.title: Mapping rules
alias_rules.subtitle: Save successful header matches so auto-matching works better in future imports.
alias_rules.empty: No saved rules yet. Use the "Remember rule" button on the desired row.
alias_rules.saved_hint: This match will already be considered in the next auto-match.

preflight.title: Pre-run check
preflight.subtitle: Here you can see what will stop data validation and what should be clarified in advance.
preflight.no_issues: No blocking issues or warnings found with the current mapping.
preflight.issue_values_unmapped: Value mapping not filled for field {field}.{count}{values}
preflight.issue_options_unavailable: Bitrix24 options did not load for field {field}.{count}{values}
preflight.issue_company_identity: Linked company data repeats by name without an explicit identifier. Add COMPANY__XML_ID or configure company deduplication.{rows}
preflight.issue_contact_identity: There are rows with identical contact data. Without an explicit identifier, each such row will create a separate contact in Bitrix24 — duplicates will appear. Add a unique external contact key column or configure deduplication by email/phone.{rows}
preflight.issue_deal_identity: There are rows with identical deal data. Without an explicit identifier, each such row will create a separate deal in Bitrix24 — duplicates will appear. Add a unique external deal key column or configure deduplication by title.{rows}

value_mapping.title: Value mapping
value_mapping.subtitle: The system found values from your file that need to be mapped to Bitrix24 options.
value_mapping.subtitle_complete: All values from the file have been successfully mapped to Bitrix24 options.

dedup.unmapped_hint: Go back to the “Field mapping” step and fill in value mapping for the marked fields.
dedup.unmapped_hint_blocked: Until this is done, the validation step is unavailable.
dedup.not_applicable_message: Duplicate search is not supported for this import type ({label}) — each file row is processed independently. Click “Validate data” to continue.
dedup.linked_intro: For linked import, duplicate rules are configured separately for each entity. For example, a company can be updated by name, while a contact is created anew or decided separately.
dedup.linked_keys_hint: Only {label} fields from the current mapping are used.
dedup.linked_keys_empty: First map the {label} fields at the mapping step.
dedup.linked_keys_required: Select at least one search key for the “{label}” entity.
dedup.simple_intro: In simple mode, duplicates are configured without extra options: you pick an action, and search keys are taken automatically from already mapped fields.
dedup.simple_hint: The simple check uses only basic fields from the mapping: Email, Phone, and Title.
dedup.simple_choose: If you want to search for duplicates, choose the “Update” or “Skip duplicate” action.
dedup.simple_no_fields: To search for duplicates in simple mode, map at least one EMAIL, PHONE, or TITLE field.
dedup.simple_match_hint: A match is searched by any of these keys. For complex scenarios, switch to advanced mode.
dedup.advanced_intro: Separately specify how to find matches and what to do with found duplicates, so the field mapping step stays clean and clear.
dedup.advanced_keys_hint: Mapped fields of the current import are used. If several keys are selected, a duplicate is searched by their combined match.
dedup.advanced_keys_empty: First map one of the EMAIL, PHONE, or TITLE fields at the mapping step.
dedup.match_all_hint: A duplicate is found only if all selected fields match
dedup.match_any_hint: A duplicate is found if at least one field matches
dedup.advanced_keys_required: Select at least one search key — without it, duplicates won't be found and all rows will be created anew.
dedup.id_search_hint: Direct search by Bitrix24 record ID

progress.label: Progress
progress.pause_title: Paused: waiting for Bitrix24 limit reset
progress.pause_description: The import will resume automatically in ~{seconds} sec.
progress.sample_description: Test import scans the entire file and shows in advance what will be created, updated, or needs duplicate resolution.
progress.dedup_description: Saving current rules so the next run uses the latest settings.
progress.validation_description: For large files validation may take time. The screen will update automatically when done.

success.file_uploaded: File uploaded. You can check the structure and fill in field mapping.
success.mapping_auto_filled: {count} mappings filled automatically. Check the result before saving.
success.mapping_saved_unmapped: Field mapping saved. Values left to map: {count}.
success.alias_exists: This mapping rule is already saved.
success.template_applied: Template applied to the current session.
success.validation_complete: Validation complete. No critical errors found.
success.validation_issues: Validation complete. Fix rows with errors before the next step.
success.test_run: Test import complete. Full file checked, you can run the real import.
success.test_run_skip: Duplicate step skipped. Test import checked the full file using the "Always create" rule.
success.test_run_decisions: Test import complete. Select action for found duplicates, then run the real import.
success.test_run_skip_rows: Test import complete. Full file checked, some rows will be skipped.
success.test_cancelled: Test import stopped. You can adjust settings and run it again.
success.import_cancel_requested: Stop requested. The current row will finish, then import will stop.
success.test_cancel_requested: Stop requested. The current row will finish, then the test import will stop.
success.import_already_done: Import is already finished or stopped. No stop needed.
success.import_finished: Import finished. You can start a new import.
success.bulk_started: Upload started. Tracking progress right here.
success.bulk_resumed: Resuming upload from where it stopped.

error.unmapped_values: First map all status and list values.
error.bulk_file_field_required: Select a File-type field to attach the attachment to.
error.bulk_file_required: Select a file for bulk attachment.
error.bulk_preview_required: First check the record selection by filter.
error.mapping_auto_failed: Could not auto-match the mapping. Check that the column headers in the file match the Bitrix24 field names.
error.bulk_scenario_crm: Select a CRM entity for bulk file attachment.
error.dry_run_no_report: Test import finished without a final report.
error.import_no_report: Import finished without a final report.
error.blocking_issues: Mapping has errors that prevent the run. Check settings in the Field Mapping step.
error.dedup_field_unmapped: Add the field to the Field Mapping step or remove it from duplicate search settings.
error.test_run_required: First run a test import on the full file.
error.pending_decisions: Select an action for each row with a found duplicate.
error.mass_create_confirm: Import stopped. Confirm bulk creation of new CRM records if this is expected.
error.dry_run_state: Test import started but current state could not be retrieved.
error.dry_run_failed: Test import failed in the background worker.
error.import_state: Import started but current state could not be retrieved.
error.import_failed: Import failed in the background worker.
error.bulk_session_failed: Failed to create bulk upload session.
error.session_restore_failed: Failed to load saved import session.
error.file_required: First select a file to import.
error.entity_required: First select an entity to import.
error.smart_process_required: First select a specific smart process.
error.format_required: Only .xlsx, .xls, or .csv files can be uploaded.
error.download_csv_failed: Failed to download the CSV report
error.download_template_failed: Failed to download the Excel template
error.template_invalid_format: The downloaded Excel template is corrupted or in an invalid format.
error.download_invalid_format: The downloaded file is corrupted or in an invalid format.

confirm.mass_create: Will create {count} new records in "{entity}". Existing records will not be updated because the "Always create" duplicate rule is currently selected. Continue import?

common.select_mode_prompt: Go back to the main screen and select an import mode.

dryrun.checks_all_title: Test import checks the whole file
dryrun.checks_all_desc: After the check you can choose duplicate decisions and run the real import separately.
dryrun.decisions_desc: Test import complete. Choose an action for each found duplicate before the real import.
dryrun.decisions_blocked: The import won't start until a decision is selected for all found duplicates.
dryrun.decisions_ready: All decisions selected. You can run the import now.
dryrun.risk_empty: No rows with incomplete duplicate search risk found.
dryrun.preview_empty: After the test import, a preliminary per-row report will appear here.
dryrun.validation_empty: No errors found. You can run the test import.

result.title: Import result
result.linked_title: What was created by linked import
result.run_empty: After running the import, a per-row summary will appear here.
result.run_filter_empty: No rows found for the selected filter.

nav.step1_desc: Choose the import scenario, file, and basic run settings.
nav.step2_desc: Check header rows, data start, and sheet structure.
nav.step3_desc: Review the first rows of the file before field mapping.
nav.step4_desc: Map file columns to Bitrix24 fields.
nav.step5_desc: Configure rules for finding and handling duplicates.
nav.step6_desc: Review the test run results before the main run.
nav.step7_desc: Review the final statistics and finish the scenario.

scenario.def_desc: Choose the import method and upload a file.
scenario.bs_desc_task: Set up a task filter and prepare a single attachment file.
scenario.bs_desc_crm: Choose a CRM entity, file field, and set up the selection filter.
scenario.br_desc_task: Review the found tasks and prepare bulk attachment.
scenario.br_desc_crm: Upload the file, review found records, and prepare bulk upload.
scenario.be_desc_task: Track the progress of attaching the file to the found tasks.
scenario.be_desc_crm: Track the upload progress, stop the import if needed, and finish the scenario.

landing.hero_subtitle: CRM entities, tasks, employees — in 7 steps with preview, duplicate check and test run.
landing.mode_hint: Mode can be changed inside the app
landing.simple_desc: Upload a file, select an entity, confirm the mapping — and start.
landing.advanced_desc: Mapping templates, fine-tuned duplicate rules, test run and detailed per-row report.

modes.simple_desc: Just a file, entity, basic field mapping and run.
modes.advanced_desc: Mapping templates, advanced duplicate rules and a detailed per-row report.

template_meta.title: Template for "{label}"
template_meta.desc: Download an Excel example with headers and one test row for the selected import.
template_meta.task_desc: No Excel template needed here: set up a task filter and upload a single attachment file.

run_completion.background: Import is running in the background. {count} rows processed so far.
run_completion.done_issues: Import complete. Some rows need attention.
run_completion.first_n: Showing first 15 items. Further details are available in the CSV report.

dedup_warning.title: Incomplete duplicate search in {count} rows
dedup_warning.desc: Duplicate search was not performed on all selected fields.

permission.err_user_id: Enter a valid Bitrix user ID

families.crm_desc: Direct import into standard CRM sections.
families.task_desc: Choose what to import into tasks.
families.linked_desc: A single Excel row creates and links several entities.
families.hr_desc: Import users and the org structure.

message.title: Hello!
message.line1: Let's test the application's operation in Bitrix24.

telemetry-test.title: Telemetry Test
telemetry-test.description: Visual verification of all telemetry channels: backend events, frontend events, Bitrix24 API calls.

section.backend_desc: Press the button — PHP backend will send 7 different events to OTel Collector.
section.frontend_desc: Each button / field / form sends the corresponding event via useTelemetry.
section.b24api_desc: Direct JS SDK calls with b24_api_call tracking.

seo.description: Example of working with application settings.

history.property_1: How many days to keep history

present.alert: Every employee login is displayed in the Event Log.
